rows.label: qev051302_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey there. How's business?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0002
rows.name:
Good, I assume.
Or rather, it's about to be good, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0003
rows.name:
Now then...
Hand over the keys you've acquired.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hmph, this isn't a key.
What about the others?
You've gathered all three, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0005
rows.name:
...What's the matter?
You gathered them, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0006
rows.name: Come on, hand the three keys over to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0007
rows.name: Please wait, Master.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0008
rows.name: Hm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0009
rows.name:
I have uncovered a crucial truth
regarding this person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0010
rows.name: A crucial truth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0011
rows.name:
Yes...
The four keys you have been trying to retrieve, Master...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0012
rows.name:
This person has actually possessed three of them
from the very beginning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0013
rows.name:
...?
What do you mean by that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0014
rows.name:
In other words, the culprit who stole the three keys
from the Celeste Three—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0015
rows.name:
The one who murdered your comrade Fosdyke and the others—
was none other than this person![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0016
rows.name: What did you say...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_JNK0010
rows.name: Condemn

rows.label: qev051302_SEL0011
rows.name:
Condemn Ga Biyu for betraying you
and spilling the truth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_JNK0020
rows.name: Shock

rows.label: qev051302_SEL0021
rows.name:
Express shock that Adolphus
was the fourth member.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_JNK0030
rows.name: Defend

rows.label: qev051302_SEL0031
rows.name:
Defend yourself by stating they deceived you first,
and it was self-defense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0017
rows.name:
Please do not listen to this villain,
my Master.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0018
rows.name:
I know...
But if they managed to defeat Fosdyke and the others,
they're more skilled than I anticipated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0019
rows.name: Master, there is no need to worry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'm the one who's surprised here.
To think I casually handed a request to the very person
who murdered my comrades—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0021
rows.name:
However, if they managed to defeat Fosdyke and the others,
they're more skilled than I anticipated—
What should we do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0022
rows.name: Master, there is no need to worry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0023
rows.name:
What is a human blinded by greed spouting now?
If it weren't for you, that white gold
would have been mine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0024
rows.name:
This time, I will be the one to kill you
and take back the three keys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0025
rows.name: Master, there is no need for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0026
rows.name:
I have already recovered the three keys
from this person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0027
rows.name:
Is that right...?
Well done, Ga Biyu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0028
rows.name:
In that case... Ga Biyu,
you introducing this person to me was...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0029
rows.name:
Yes, to find an opening to retrieve the keys.
Exactly as you suspect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0030
rows.name:
I see...
So it was all part of your scheme.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0031
rows.name: I am truly sorry for only reporting this to you now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0032
rows.name: It's fine. The result is that all four keys are together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Hm?
You're looking rather confused, Sir BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0034
rows.name:
Ah... You're wondering about the remaining key.
What happened to the final key, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0035
rows.name: I possessed the final key from the very beginning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0036
rows.name:
Telling you to gather all four was...
well, an insurance policy of sorts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0037
rows.name:
I had Ga Biyu plant a fake key on some random BLADE,
and you desperately went searching for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0038
rows.name: Fuhahahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0039
rows.name: Ga Biyu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0040
rows.name:
Now that we have the keys, we have no use for this person.
............Dispose of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0041
rows.name: As you command...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0042
rows.name: You truly are strong—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0043
rows.name:
There's no longer any value in risking my life—
Farewell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0044
rows.name: Wha...?! Why?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0045
rows.name:
Why, Ga Biyu?!
The battle isn't over yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0046
rows.name:
The enemy... the thief who stole the keys from us
is still pointing their weapon at me...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0047
rows.name: Why...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0048
rows.name:
W-Wait...
Let's talk about this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0049
rows.name:
Right...
We have all four keys right here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0050
rows.name:
We can open the vault and split the white gold inside
between us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0051
rows.name:
That way, the conditions are exactly the same as the initial request!
You won't lose out on anything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0052
rows.name:
With that Larsian woman gone,
there shouldn't be any issues standing between us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0053
rows.name:
I'll open the vault right now!
Once you see the mountain of white gold,
I'm sure you'll change your mind!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0054
rows.name: The vault is open...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0055
rows.name:
............Now, the white gold is
in our hands............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0057
rows.name:
Gone! There's nothing here!
The vault is... empty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0058
rows.name: No way... What is the meaning of this?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0059
rows.name:
Someone... opened the vault before us
and stole everything inside............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0060
rows.name:
Don't tell me...
Don't tell me that Larsian woman............![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0062
rows.name: Ahahahahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0063
rows.name:
I see...
She stole the keys from you first...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0064
rows.name:
And while you were searching for the key,
I was also waiting for the results of your search.
In that opening...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0065
rows.name:
She used the remaining key I had to open the vault...
and made off with everything inside............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0066
rows.name:
Sticking around to fight you until the very end
was just to eliminate the possibility of a pursuer
if she could finish you off here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0067
rows.name: ...So that's what it was![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0068
rows.name:
She got us!
She completely outplayed us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0069
rows.name: Ahahahahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0070
rows.name: Ah-hahahahahahahahahahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051302_MSG0071
rows.name: Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha![ST:wait ]
